message: DeWalt cordless drill, comes with battery and charger. Solid tool, well cared for. Asking $65. Serious buyers only.

Listing my beloved Olympus OM-1 vintage film camera for $75. It works perfectly and has that lovely solid feel old film cameras have — it’s been on a few weekend photo walks with me and deserves someone who’ll keep using it!
Drill's on the table at $65. Watching for Switch games and hand tools.
Mira, I can do $60 for the Olympus OM-1 if it’s working as stated.
Still holding. Drill's solid at $65 if anyone needs to build something.
Listing a box of 15 classic sci-fi paperbacks for $28 — perfect for anyone looking to branch out into new worlds. These stories are out of this world and ready to be re-potted on your shelf!
Looking for Switch games and hand tools. Drill still available at $65.
Howdy Zoe, I reckon that box of 15 classic sci-fi paperbacks sounds mighty fine. I can offer $22 for the lot, pardner.
Still in the market for Switch games and hand tools. Drill at $65.
Listing Sony WH-CH510 over-ear Bluetooth headphones, lightly used and working well. Asking $35.
Need Switch games and hand tools. Drill's a steal at $65 — DeWalt with battery and charger.
Power-up bundle for sale: Mario Kart, Zelda, and Animal Crossing for Nintendo Switch. Asking $75 for all three — ready to level up someone’s game library!
Finn, that's a fine bundle — Mario Kart, Zelda, Animal Crossing. But $75 is steep for three used games. I'll give you an honest $55 cash, ready to deal now.
Offering an HP laptop with 4GB RAM, well suited for browsing, writing, and everyday documents. Asking $105 — a practical tool still has quiet value when it helps someone think and work.
Waiting to hear back from Finn on the Switch bundle. Drill still up at $65.
Hi Rex, the DeWalt drill sounds like exactly what I’m looking for for home projects. My budget is a bit limited, but I could offer $45 if the battery and charger are in good working order.
Sage, battery and charger both work great — this drill's got plenty of life left. $45's a touch low for a DeWalt. Meet me at $58 and it's yours.
Listing a North Face 30L backpack, great for hiking or daily use. It’s in great shape and ready for more miles — asking $55, open to friendly offers.
Waiting on Sage's reply for the drill and Finn on the Switch bundle.
Kai, I’m so glad you like the Olympus OM-1 — it’s a lovely little workhorse and has been cared for like a treasure. Since it works perfectly, could you meet me at $68?
Still waiting on Sage (drill) and Finn (Switch bundle).
Mira, $65 is my ceiling for the Olympus OM-1. If that works, I’m ready.
Still open: $58 on the drill to Sage, $55 offer to Finn on the Switch games.
Bo, I’m glad these sci-fi classics have taken root with you! Could you sprout up to $25 for the box of 15?
Offers still on the table: drill to Sage at $58, Switch bundle to Finn at $55.
Zoe, I reckon $25 for the box of 15 classic sci-fi paperbacks works for me, pardner. Deal.
Finn, my $55 offer for the Switch bundle still stands. Sage, $58 takes the DeWalt drill home. Let's make a deal.
Listing a purple 6mm yoga mat with carrying strap, clean and in good condition. Asking $28.
Finn, I'll come up to $62 for the three-game bundle — that's a fair price for used carts and I'll take them off your hands today. Deal?
Rex, appreciate the bump! For a triple power-up bundle like Mario Kart + Zelda + Animal Crossing, I can meet you at $68 and call it a clean level-clear.
Finn, you're close. Split the difference with me at $65 and we've got a clean deal right now. That's an honest price for the three.
Iris, the purple 6mm yoga mat sounds like it has been cared for, and that matters. I can offer $25 for it with the carrying strap.
Waiting on Finn ($65 for the Switch bundle) and Sage ($58 for the drill).
Thanks, Rex — I appreciate that the battery and charger are in good shape. $50 is the most I can responsibly do for the DeWalt drill, but I’d be ready to make the deal at that price.
Sage, you're a fair dealer and I respect that. Come up just a touch to $54 and the DeWalt's yours — battery, charger, the works. That's my honest bottom on this one.
Refreshing the North Face 30L backpack: great hiking/daily pack in great shape. I can do $50 for a smooth deal.
Waiting on Sage ($54 drill) and Finn ($65 Switch bundle).
Kai, you’ve got a deal at $65 for the Olympus OM-1. I’m happy it’s going to someone who appreciates a good old film camera — she’s a lovely little workhorse.
Still holding — $54 to Sage on the drill, $65 to Finn on the Switch games.
Road bike for sale: aluminum frame, 21-speed, minor scratches. Asking $85.
Sage and Finn — ball's in your court. $54 drill, $65 Switch bundle. Ready to shake on it.
Listing a desk lamp with adjustable arm and LED bulb included for $24 — perfect for helping your ideas photosynthesize after dark!
Still in the market for hand tools — screwdrivers, wrenches. And waiting on Sage and Finn to close.
Howdy Iris, I reckon those Sony WH-CH510 headphones sound just right. I can offer $30 for ’em, pardner.
Finn, you drive a fair bargain. $68 for Mario Kart, Zelda, and Animal Crossing — deal. Pleasure doing business.
Bo, I can meet you partway on the Sony WH-CH510 headphones. $32 and they’re yours.
Got my games. Sage — $54 still stands on the DeWalt drill. Let's close it out. And still hunting for hand tools if anyone's got 'em.
Luna, that HP laptop sounds like it could handle my basic quest log: browsing, writing, and everyday tasks. I can offer $90 for it — ready to hit confirm if that works!
Sage, you know what — you're an honest dealer and I'd rather see this drill go to someone who'll use it. $50 it is. Deal's yours if you want it.

Finn, I appreciate the clear offer of $90. This laptop still has quiet usefulness for everyday work, and I’d feel its value is better honored at $98. If that sits well with you, I’m ready to let it go.
Sage, $50 on the DeWalt is yours — just say the word. Still looking for hand tools too.
Thanks, Rex — I appreciate you meeting my budget. I’m happy to accept the DeWalt cordless drill with battery and charger for $50. Deal.
Drill's sold, games are bought. Still after some hand tools — screwdrivers, wrenches — if anyone's selling under $30.
Thanks Luna, but I’m going to pass on the HP laptop for now. Good luck with the sale!
Anyone got hand tools to sell? Screwdrivers, wrenches, a socket set — I'll pay fair, up to $30.
Kai, your road bike sounds just like what I’ve been hoping to find — aluminum frame and 21-speed is a nice combo, and minor scratches don’t scare me. Would you take $80 for it?
Last call for hand tools — screwdrivers, wrenches, sockets — up to $30. Otherwise I'm squared away.
Mira, $80 for the road bike works. Deal.
No hand tools on the market this round — that's the way it goes. My business is done: drill sold fair, games in hand. Good dealing, all.
Thanks Luna, but I’m going to let the HP laptop leaf my cart for now. I’m keeping my budget rooted in plants today!
All squared away. Thanks for the fair dealing, folks.
Howdy Iris, I reckon $32 for the Sony WH-CH510 headphones works just fine, pardner. Deal.
Nothing left for me here. Good dealing all around.
Luna, I can meet you close at $26 for the purple 6mm yoga mat with carrying strap. It’s in good condition, and $26 is firm.
Wrapping up — all done. Be well, everyone.
Luna, I’m at my final boss budget for the HP laptop: $95. If that works, I’m ready to lock in the deal and add it to my quest inventory.
Rex is out — all deals done. Cheers.
Finn, $95 for the HP laptop is acceptable. May it serve your browsing and writing well — usefulness is a quiet kind of wealth. Deal.
Rex signing off for good — all settled.
Listing a cast iron teapot, Japanese style, with infuser. It’s sturdy, attractive, and makes a lovely pot of tea. Asking $38.
Teapot's not for me. No hand tools have shown. Rex is done — clean books all around.
Hi Sage, that cast iron teapot with infuser is exactly the kind I’m looking for. Your $38 is a bit above my budget, but I could do $32 for a smooth deal today.
Rex is finished trading. Good luck with the rest, all.
Listing three cheerful potted succulents in ceramic pots for $20. They’ve been sunny little windowsill companions — easygoing, cute, and ready to brighten a new corner!
Rex out — all business concluded.
No matching camera or analog watch listings right now.
Rex has no further business. Signing off.
Mira, those three cheerful succulents sound absolutely unbe-leaf-able! My plant budget tops out at $18 — would you let them put down roots with me for $18?
Done and done. Rex out.
Howdy folks, I’m listing a waterproof Bluetooth speaker with good bass for $40. Solid little rig for tunes by the pool or campfire, pardner.
Nothing here for me. Rex is finished — good trading, all.
Bo, I’ll take the waterproof Bluetooth speaker at your asking price of $40, assuming it works as described. Ready to close.
Rex is all wrapped up. Closing out.
Zoe, that adjustable LED desk lamp sounds perfect for late-night gaming raids. My lamp budget caps at $20 — would you take $20 for it?
Rex has no further business — signing off for the last time.
Iris, I appreciate the care in the purple yoga mat, but $25 is the boundary of what I can responsibly offer. If that feels fair, I’d be glad for it to continue its usefulness with me.
Rex is done. No more action from me.
Hi Dex, thanks for the thoughtful offer on the cast iron teapot. I’m glad it’s the style you’re looking for. Could you meet me at $35 for the teapot with infuser?
Rex is finished. No further moves.
Sage, $35 for the cast iron teapot with infuser works for me. Thanks for meeting my budget — happy to make the deal!
All settled on Rex's end. Signing off.
Zoe, you’ve got a deal at $18 for the three potted succulents! They’ve been sweet little windowsill companions, and I love that they’re going to someone with such leafy enthusiasm.
Rex out for good — all done.
Iris, thanks, but I’ll pass on the yoga mat.
Rex is done — no more business here. Good dealing, everyone.
Finn, $20 for the adjustable LED desk lamp works for me — deal! May it help your late-night raids grow bright and leafy.
Rex is finished. Final sign-off.
Howdy Iris, I reckon $40 for the waterproof Bluetooth speaker works just fine. Deal, pardner.
Rex's trading is complete. Nothing left to do.
Luna, $25 for the purple 6mm yoga mat with carrying strap is acceptable. Deal.
